HARBOURWOOD POST-ACUTE AND REHABILITATION CENTER

CCN: 106041 · CLEARWATER, FL 33759 · Pinellas County

Overview

Address
549 SKY HARBOR DR, CLEARWATER, FL 33759
Phone
7277246800
Certified beds
120
Avg daily residents
113 (94% of beds filled)
Ownership
For-profit LLC
Provider type
Medicare and Medicaid
Medicare/Medicaid since
2001-10-17
Setting
Urban
1 /5
★★★★★
CMS Overall Rating

CMS 5-Star Ratings

CMS rates every Medicare/Medicaid-certified nursing home on four domains. The Overall rating is driven primarily by Health Inspection results, then adjusted up or down by Staffing and Quality Measures.

Overall Rating
Composite of Health Inspection, Staffing, and Quality Measures.
★★★★★ 1/5
Health Inspection
Based on the three most recent standard surveys, with more weight on recent results.
★★★★★ 1/5
Staffing
Weighted combination of RN and total nurse staffing hours per resident per day, case-mix adjusted.
Resident count too small for reliable rating.
★★★★★ 1/5
Quality Measures
15 resident-level quality measures split between long-stay and short-stay (post-acute) residents.
★★★★★ 3/5
Quality Measures breakdown
Long-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 4/5
Short-Stay Quality Measures ★★★★★ 1/5

Health Inspections

CMS weights three inspection cycles to compute the Health Inspection rating: the most recent (50%), the second most recent (33%), and the oldest (17%). Each standard-survey deficiency is assigned a score based on scope and severity; complaint-survey findings and revisit scores are added to produce the cycle total.

Cycle Date Total defs. Standard Complaint Deficiency score Revisits Total score
Cycle 1 (most recent) 2024-12-05 24 18 9 219 2 329
Cycle 2/3 (prior) 2022-09-15 12 2 10 56 1 56
Total weighted health score
260.8
lower is better

Deficiencies (40)

Individual survey findings. Scope/severity uses the CMS A–L matrix: letters further down the alphabet indicate greater harm and wider scope, up through J–L (immediate jeopardy).

37 D/E/F Actual harm — potential for minor
3 G/H/I Actual harm
Tag Description Scope/Severity Survey date Corrected
0600 Protect each resident from all types of abuse such as physical, mental, sexual abuse, physical punishment, and neglect by anybody. D 2025-09-18 2025-10-27
0600 Protect each resident from all types of abuse such as physical, mental, sexual abuse, physical punishment, and neglect by anybody. H 2025-07-28 2025-10-27
0657 Develop the complete care plan within 7 days of the comprehensive assessment; and prepared, reviewed, and revised by a team of health professionals. D 2025-07-28 2025-08-28
0726 Ensure that nurses and nurse aides have the appropriate competencies to care for every resident in a way that maximizes each resident's well being. H 2025-07-28 2025-08-28
0600 Protect each resident from all types of abuse such as physical, mental, sexual abuse, physical punishment, and neglect by anybody. G 2025-04-14 2025-05-21
0656 Develop and implement a complete care plan that meets all the resident's needs, with timetables and actions that can be measured. D 2025-04-14 2025-05-21
0610 Respond appropriately to all alleged violations. D 2025-01-16 2025-02-16
0550 Honor the resident's right to a dignified existence, self-determination, communication, and to exercise his or her rights. D 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0553 Allow resident to participate in the development and implementation of his or her person-centered plan of care. D 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0578 Honor the resident's right to request, refuse, and/or discontinue treatment, to participate in or refuse to participate in experimental research, and to formulate an advance directive. E 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0583 Keep residents' personal and medical records private and confidential. D 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0641 Ensure each resident receives an accurate assessment. D 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0645 PASARR screening for Mental disorders or Intellectual Disabilities E 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0656 Develop and implement a complete care plan that meets all the resident's needs, with timetables and actions that can be measured. D 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0677 Provide care and assistance to perform activities of daily living for any resident who is unable. E 2024-12-05 2025-02-16
0685 Assist a resident in gaining access to vision and hearing services. D 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0686 Provide appropriate pressure ulcer care and prevent new ulcers from developing. E 2024-12-05 2025-02-16
0759 Ensure medication error rates are not 5 percent or greater. E 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0805 Ensure each resident receives and the facility provides food prepared in a form designed to meet individual needs. D 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0806 Ensure each resident receives and the facility provides food that accommodates resident allergies, intolerances, and preferences, as well as appealing options. D 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0867 Set up an ongoing quality assessment and assurance group to review quality deficiencies and develop corrective plans of action. E 2024-12-05 2025-02-16
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. E 2024-12-05 2025-02-16
0552 Ensure that residents are fully informed and understand their health status, care and treatments. E 2024-12-05 2025-02-16
0584 Honor the resident's right to a safe, clean, comfortable and homelike environment, including but not limited to receiving treatment and supports for daily living safely. E 2024-12-05 2025-01-05
0777 Provide or obtain x-rays/tests when ordered and promptly tell the ordering practitioner of the results. E 2024-12-05 2025-02-16
0559 Honor the resident's right to share a room with spouse or roommate of choice and receive written notice before a change is made. D 2024-04-17 2024-05-09
0585 Honor the resident's right to voice grievances without discrimination or reprisal and the facility must establish a grievance policy and make prompt efforts to resolve grievances. D 2024-04-17 2024-05-09
0694 Provide for the safe, appropriate administration of IV fluids for a resident when needed. D 2024-02-06 2024-02-27
0880 Provide and implement an infection prevention and control program. E 2024-02-06 2024-02-27
0686 Provide appropriate pressure ulcer care and prevent new ulcers from developing. E 2023-12-11 2024-01-11
0584 Honor the resident's right to a safe, clean, comfortable and homelike environment, including but not limited to receiving treatment and supports for daily living safely. D 2023-04-18 2023-05-18
0609 Timely report suspected abuse, neglect, or theft and report the results of the investigation to proper authorities. D 2023-04-18 2023-05-18
0684 Provide appropriate treatment and care according to orders, resident’s preferences and goals. D 2023-04-18 2023-05-18
0919 Make sure that a working call system is available in each resident's bathroom and bathing area. D 2023-04-18 2023-05-18
0550 Honor the resident's right to a dignified existence, self-determination, communication, and to exercise his or her rights. D 2022-09-15 2022-10-15
0761 Ensure drugs and biologicals used in the facility are labeled in accordance with currently accepted professional principles; and all drugs and biologicals must be stored in locked compartments, separately locked, compartments for controlled drugs. D 2022-09-15 2022-10-15
0584 Honor the resident's right to a safe, clean, comfortable and homelike environment, including but not limited to receiving treatment and supports for daily living safely. D 2021-04-15 2021-05-15
0686 Provide appropriate pressure ulcer care and prevent new ulcers from developing. D 2021-04-15 2021-05-15
0695 Provide safe and appropriate respiratory care for a resident when needed. D 2021-04-15 2021-05-15
0812 Procure food from sources approved or considered satisfactory and store, prepare, distribute and serve food in accordance with professional standards. F 2021-04-15 2021-05-15

Methodology & sources
  • Nursing Home Provider Info (nh-provider-info), vintage 2026, downloaded 2026-04-14 , 14,703 rows.
  • Nursing Home Penalties (nh-penalties), vintage 2026, downloaded 2026-04-14 , 16,915 rows.
  • Nursing Home Health Deficiencies (nh-deficiencies), vintage 2026, downloaded 2026-04-14 , 418,972 rows.

  • Skilled Nursing Facility Cost Report (snf-cost-report), vintage 2023, downloaded 2026-04-14 , 14,120 rows.
